summary: GlowShape beauty salon booking system - All critical features tested and working. Fixed 1 bug in backend (temoignages endpoint). Both frontend and backend are fully functional.

fixed.issue: Was using 'createdAt' instead of 'created_at' in ORDER BY clause - FIXED by updating routes.js line 118

critical_code_review_comments: Hero image has generic alt='Hero' which could be more descriptive for accessibility
Reservation dates shown are 48h in future as expected - working correctly
seed_data_creation: None - using existing seeded data (14 prestations)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All reported bugs have been fixed. The defensive Array.isArray checks in Prestations.js and Reservation.js are working correctly. PostgreSQL database is restored with 14 prestations. Stripe integration loaded in frontend (not fully tested as it requires real payment flow).

prestations_page.details: 14 prestations displayed, no JS errors, no 'filteredPrestations.map is not a function' error

reservation_step1.details: 14 prestation options displayed, selection works correctly

reservation_step2.details: Dates shown are 48h+ in future (starting March 18), 19 time slots returned for selected date, clicking date shows creneaux

reservation_step3.details: Client form displayed with nom, email, telephone fields

home_hero_image.details: Hero image loads correctly from Unsplash, no broken image visible

api_prestations.details: Returns array of 14 prestations with all required fields

api_disponibilites.details: Returns valid time slots array with heure_debut, heure_fin, disponible fields

admin_login.details: Login with admin@glowshape.fr/admin123 works, redirects to dashboard showing 14 prestations
